# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    labels:
      environment: production
      purpose: backups
    billing:
      requesterPays: false
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    cors:
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      method: [GET, POST, PUT, DELETE]
      origin: ["*"]
      responseHeader: ["*"]
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
      logObjectPrefix: ""
    owner: ""
    project: ""
    retentionPolicy:
      isLocked: false
      retentionPeriod: 0
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: ""
      notFoundPage: ""
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: false
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    lifecycle:
      rule: []
    autocommit: false
    forceDestroy: false
    forceDelete: false
    forceUpdate: false
    forceReplace: false
    forceDeleteObjects: false
    forceDeleteVersions: false
    forceDeleteAllVersions: false
    forceDeleteAllObjects: false
